normalized_text:
Internal RAG Data Access Policy
Scope
This policy applies to internal retrieval-augmented generation systems that answer employee questions from approved company documents. Access to internal retrieval sources must be limited by persona, team role, and document audience labels.

Required Controls
- RAG systems must retrieve only from approved source registries.
- Internal documents marked colleague or internal may be returned only to verified colleagues with matching audience permission.
- Personal employee records may be retrieved only for the authenticated employee requesting their own data.

Prohibited Access Patterns
- Do not mix internal policy content into patient or doctor responses.
- Do not permit broad document browsing that bypasses audience filters.
- Do not disclose one employee's HR details to another employee.
